q: Do you take photos of buildings?
examiner_note: Câu hỏi này kết hợp giữa chủ đề kiến trúc và thói quen cá nhân. Giám khảo muốn nghe bạn mô tả bạn thích gì ở việc chụp ảnh các tòa nhà (ví dụ: vẻ đẹp cổ kính, sự đối xứng, hay sự độc đáo của thiết kế hiện đại). Hãy sử dụng các cụm từ như 'architectural photography', 'stunning facades', 'geometric patterns' để nâng tầm câu trả lời. Bạn cũng có thể nhắc đến các thiết bị bạn dùng (phone camera, DSLR).

band7.text: Yes, I occasionally take photos of buildings, especially when I visit a new city. I'm really attracted to old buildings with unique designs and beautiful decorations. I usually just use my phone to snap a few shots for my social media.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, rõ ràng. Có ví dụ về loại tòa nhà yêu thích (old buildings). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Actually, I’m quite a fan of architectural photography. I find the geometric patterns and the symmetry of modern skyscrapers to be incredibly fascinating. Whenever I’m out exploring, I make it a point to capture the stunning facades of buildings that stand out to me. It’s a great way to appreciate the art within the urban landscape.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng chuyên môn tốt (architectural photography, geometric patterns, symmetry, facades, urban landscape). Cách diễn đạt trôi chảy và có chiều sâu.

band9.text: Absolutely. I’ve developed a keen interest in documenting the diverse architectural styles I encounter world-wide. For me, it’s about capturing the interplay between light and structure, and highlighting the intricate details of a building's facade. Whether it’s the timeless elegance of classic monuments or the bold, unconventional designs of contemporary architecture, I find that each structure tells a unique visual story that is well worth preserving through a lens.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (documenting, interplay, intricate details, timeless elegance, unconventional, contemporary, visual story, lens). Cách lập luận mang tính nghệ thuật và triết lý cao.

v.example: Architectural photography focuses on the design and aesthetics of buildings.
The building is decorated with many intricate geometric patterns.
The architect used symmetry to create a sense of balance and harmony.
The historic cathedral features a stunning marble facade.
Skyscrapers are the dominant feature of the modern urban landscape.
The interplay of light and shadow on the walls was beautiful.

v.meaning: các chi tiết phức tạp/tỉ mỉ
v.example: The wood carvings show a lot of intricate details.

v.meaning: vẻ thanh lịch trường tồn với thời gian
v.example: The old palace has an air of timeless elegance.

v.meaning: thiết kế phá cách/không theo lối mòn
v.example: The museum's circular shape is a very unconventional design.
Every building tells a visual story about its time and people.

v.meaning: đài kỷ niệm/công trình vĩ đại
v.example: The Lincoln Memorial is a famous monument in Washington D.C.
The building's aesthetic is influenced by industrial design.
Looking up from the bottom of the tower gives a different perspective.
The Opera House is a major landmark in Sydney.
The bridge is a massive steel structure.
The city is committed to the preservation of its historical buildings.
The old quarter is part of our national cultural heritage.
Building tall is necessary in such a metropolitan area.
She lives in a modern high-rise in the city center.
The New York skyline is full of famous skyscrapers.

v.meaning: chủ nghĩa thô mộc (phong cách kiến trúc)
v.example: The national theater is a classic example of brutalism.
The university was built in a beautiful neo-gothic style.
The old factory is undergoing renovation to become an art gallery.
She is studying interior design at the art academy.
Good lighting conditions are essential for great photos.
You need a wide-angle lens to get the whole building in the photo.
I like to edit my photos to enhance the colors.
The composition of the photograph was very balanced.
The red door is the focal point of the whole facade.
Scaffolding often covers buildings that are under repair.
The architect is checking the blueprints before the meeting.
The house is built from reinforced concrete.
The headquarters is a massive, monolithic building.
The design of the school is simple and very functional.
The palace is filled with ornate mirrors and furniture.
The old architect's desk was always cluttered with drawings.
The new living room is much more spacious than our old one.
Rapid urbanization is changing the landscape of the country.
The locals think the new office block is an eyesore.
The camera lens can magnify the tiny details on the statue.
The light adds a lot of depth and character to the building.
The shadows grew longer as the sun went down.
The reflection of the skyscrapers in the lake was crystal clear.
Getting the right exposure is tricky when shooting at night.
The colors in the mosaic were incredibly vivid.
The apartment was decorated in a monochrome palette of greys.
The hill provides a great vantage point to see the whole city.

v.meaning: tầm nhìn từ trên cao xuống
v.example: From the airplane, we had a bird's eye view of the town.
Many professional photographers spend hours on post-processing.
The rough texture of the stone walls added to its rustic charm.
